meta.title: Alban Pierson — Full-Stack Developer
meta.description: Portfolio of Alban Pierson, a web developer passionate about technology and motivated by the desire to learn and take on new challenges.

about.tagline: Driven to build the web of tomorrow.
about.bio: Developer, passionate about web and technology. Driven by a desire to learn, I enjoy taking on new challenges and putting my skills to work in the service of innovation.

items.name: Oracle
items.description: Designed and built a resilient backend architecture for publishing decentralized price feeds on-chain. Three decoupled services with fault tolerance, rate limiting, and async job orchestration, built to handle high-frequency data from multiple exchanges (Binance, Bybit, Bitget).

items.name: Greenhouse
items.description: Web3 platform connecting creators and sponsors within the Chiliz ecosystem. Involved taking over an external codebase, reverse engineering it, cleaning up technical debt, and bringing it to production.

items.name: Social
items.description: Built a Twitter-like backend microservice handling posts, comments, and user profiles. Optimized feeds with Redis caching for fast response times. Event-driven architecture via Symfony Messenger for async processing of actions (posts, interactions). Full business rules engine: marketing logic, interest scoring, virality algorithm, blocking system, country-based geo-restrictions.

items.name: Agenda
items.description: Redesign of an internal tool managing all events offered by the libraries of the Lyon metropolis, led from A to Z, from conception to production.
